---
title: "muninn.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/muninn.py"
loc: 217
complexity: 34
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 3.24
overall_score: 2.13
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating Muninn, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 213 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.metrics](file://src.core.metrics)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.telemetry](file://src.core.telemetry)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.code_sanitizer](file://src.sentinel.code_sanitizer)
- [src.sentinel.stability](file://src.sentinel.stability)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)
- [tests.integration.project_fishtest](file://tests.integration.project_fishtest)
- [tests.harness.raven_proxy](file://tests.harness.raven_proxy)
- [importlib](file://importlib)
- [inspect](file://inspect)
- [sys](file://sys)

### Exports
- `Muninn`
- `__init__`
- `_is_repo_silent`
- `_wait_for_silence`
- `run_cycle`
- `_execute_mission`
- `_forge_improvement`
- `_generate_gauntlet`
- `_generate_steel`
- `_verify_fix`
- `_finalize_success`
- `_handle_failure`
- `_rollback`
- `_flag_blocked`
- `_execute_hunt_async`
